name: Sealy Everlite Airy Polyfiber 2-Stage Crib and Toddler Mattress
description:
The Sealy EverLite Foam Crib and Toddler Mattress features a spring-less dual-stage design with a firmer infant side, as recommended by doctors, and softer toddler side for extra comfort. A feather-light hypoallergenic poly core creates a firm and durable sleeping foundation for baby. An additional extra comfy layer on the toddler side provides additional support and softness for growing babies. A full cotton wrap encircles the mattress for comfort and protection, while the airflow pocket allows the mattress to naturally breathe. A premium cotton cover is soft and breathable on baby’s skin and offers a waterproof barrier to help prevent liquids from seeping inside the mattress. This easy-clean baby mattress also features waterproof lock-stitch binding for moisture protection. The Sealy EverLite Foam Crib mattress is light weight so parents can easily change baby’s bedding, plus it is designed to provide a snug, secure fit in full-size cribs and toddler beds. This mattress passes safety, quality and chemical testing to ensure baby is safe and sound on a Sealy, plus the entire mattress is GREENGUARD Gold Certified for low chemical emissions to help create a healthier nursery for baby.

All New Material Consisting of 
"81% Polyester Fiber Batting
19% Blended Fiber Batting
(44% Rayon, 36% Cotton, 20% Polyester)"
